introSection: El Bandido is a steel roller coaster located at Western Playland in Sunland Park, New Mexico, USA. It opened on August 24, 1974. It was previously located in El Paso, Texas but moved with the park after the 2005 season.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Green track with white supports. The track was previously painted red.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: It has the oldest style of Zyklon cars with the flat front.

fullText:
El Bandido is a steel roller coaster located at Western Playland in Sunland Park, New Mexico, USA. It opened on August 24, 1974. It was previously located in El Paso, Texas but moved with the park after the 2005 season.

Green track with white supports. The track was previously painted red.

It has the oldest style of Zyklon cars with the flat front.
